THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARUSDOTTIR, ERNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, NICOLAS J. $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, THE JUDGMENT IS TO BE SATISFIED FROM ATTORNEY RODDICK'S TRUST ACCOUNT WHICH CONTAIN $700.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GOMEZ, NICOLAS J. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LARUSDOTTIR, ERNA $300.96 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.96, THE SAME RULING AS ABOVE APPLIES TO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
